creator: jh@sirocco.sandstorm.net
text:
The X server quits when started, with "Error in I830WaitLpRing(),
timeout for 2 seconds" a debugging dump, and then "Fatal server error:
lockup".

(I've been able to get the server to start/run by including "NoAccel",
but I get an unusable screen of rolling video hash whose bottom edge
follows the cursor around as I move the mouse)

Full Xorg.7.log, dmesg, pciconf -lv output, and package list follow here.
